final_answer:
`nonce` (not “none”) is the per-validator sequence number for the approval round.

Why this matters: it prevents replay/duplicate processing and cleanly separates one vote round from the next.

What should be done next:
1. Keep all votes for the current round on the same `nonce`.
2. Start a new round with `nonce + 1` (new snapshot).
